final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: editorial photo, magazine cover style
Primary request: a Japanese high school girl in sailor uniform standing in front of a school building during cherry blossom season
Scene/backdrop: traditional Japanese school campus, classic concrete school building with large windows, cherry blossom trees in full bloom
Subject: teenage Japanese girl wearing navy sailor uniform (seifuku), short pleated skirt, hair gently blown by breeze, serene youthful expression
Style/medium: soft film photography, Japanese youth magazine aesthetic
Composition/framing: medium shot, eye-level angle, subject slightly off-center with cherry blossoms framing the scene
Lighting/mood: bright spring sunlight, soft golden hour glow, fresh and youthful atmosphere
Color palette: soft pink cherry blossoms + navy blue uniform + warm sunlight + pale blue sky
Materials/textures: delicate falling cherry blossom petals, crisp cotton uniform fabric, soft hair strands in motion
Constraints: keep the fresh youthful Japanese spring vibe, sailor uniform must be recognizable style
Avoid: over-saturated colors, anime-style proportions, cluttered background, harsh shadows
